raw: {"perspective": "Product Strategist", "findings": [{"severity": "critical", "file_or_area": "services/assessment/irt_calibration.py", "issue": "Referenced calibration script does not exist in codebase", "recommended_fix": "Create the IRT calibration pipeline using historical data; validate with MLE on top 3 volatile competencies"}, {"severity": "high", "file_or_area": "AURA scoring", "issue": "Core IRT engine uses 8 independent 3PL models instead of unified MIRT per ADR-004", "recommended_fix": "Upgrade to multidimensional IRT to improve score accuracy and cross-competency correlation"}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": null, "next_files_to_read": ["adr/ADR-004-assessment-engine.md", "services/assessment/irt_engine.py"]}

findings.issue: Referenced calibration script does not exist in codebase
findings.recommended_fix: Create the IRT calibration pipeline using historical data; validate with MLE on top 3 volatile competencies

findings.issue: Core IRT engine uses 8 independent 3PL models instead of unified MIRT per ADR-004
findings.recommended_fix: Upgrade to multidimensional IRT to improve score accuracy and cross-competency correlation
